en: Tell him honestly, simply, kindly, but firmly. Don't make a big production. Don't make up a elaborate story. This will help you avoid a big tear-jerking scene.
ko: 그에게 솔직하고 간단하게, 친절하지만 단호하게 말하세요.
vi: Dieu nay se giup ban tranh duoc

en: If you want to date other people, say so. Be prepared for the boy to feel hurt and rejected. Even if you've gone together for only a short time and haven't been too serious, there's still a feeling of rejection when someone says she prefers the company of others to your exclusive company.
ko: 다른 사람과 사귀고 싶다면 그렇게 말하세요.
ja: 彼が傷つき拒絶されたと感じる準備をして。短い間だけ付き合っていて
zhTW: 準備好男生會感到受傷和被拒絕。即使你們只交往了很短的時間而且
vi: Hay chuan bi cho viec cau ay se cam thay ton thuong va bi tu choi. Ngay ca khi ban chi quen nhau mot thoi gian ngan va

en: But if you're honest and direct, and avoid making a flowery emotional speech when you break the news, the boy will respect you for your frankness, and honestly, he'll appreciate the kind straightforward manner in which you told him your decision. Unless he's a real jerk or a crybaby, you'll remain friends.
ja: 別れを告げるときに感情的な演説を避ければ、彼はあなたの率直さを尊重するし、
zhTW: 在告知消息時避免煽情的演講，男生會尊重你的坦率，
vi: va tranh bai phat bieu day cam xuc khi thong bao tin, cau ay se ton trong su thang than cua ban,

en: I'm popular. I'm a quarterback. I'm popular. My mom says I'm a catch. I'm popular. I'm never last picked. I got a cheerleading chick.
ja: 人気者だ。最後に選ばれることはない。
zhTW: 很受歡迎。我從來不是最後被選的。
vi: duoc yeu thich. Toi khong bao gio bi chon cuoi cung.
